changeSet.author: openelis-gbd
changeSet.comment: Add permission_level column for action-level access control (if not already present)

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page_allowed_roles WHERE notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Genomics%')) AND role = 'GBD Lab Technician'

update.where: notebook_page_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 1 AND notebook_id IN (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Genomics%')) AND role = 'GBD Lab Technician'
